heading: Organization
label: 140401 Organization
notes: References in TextSection 501 of the Internal Revenue Code of 1986, referred to in subsec. (a), is classified to , Internal Revenue Code.section 501 of Title 26

children.heading: .—Federal Charter
children.label: a .—Federal Charter
children.text: Military Officers Association of America (in this chapter, the “corporation”), a nonprofit organization that meets the requirements for a veterans service organization under section 501(c)(19) of the Internal Revenue Code of 1986 and is organized under the laws of the Commonwealth of Virginia, is a federally chartered corporation.

children.heading: .—Expiration of Charter
children.label: b .—Expiration of Charter
children.text: If the corporation does not comply with the provisions of this chapter, the charter granted by subsection (a) shall expire.
